appartamenti.title: Sleep
appartamenti.description: Discover our spacious and welcoming apartments, ideal for a comfortable stay surrounded by nature.
appartamenti.title1: A stay to experience, not just to tell
appartamenti.paragraph1:
At Agriturismo Segarelli we have been welcoming our guests since 2008, sharing the pleasure of an authentic holiday in Tuscany.
Three independent apartments, nature all around, and a story that continues with those who choose to live it

slides.title: Sleep
slides.text: Spacious, quiet, and welcoming spaces. Three apartments, some connected, so you can truly feel at home: Acacia, Edera, and Gelsomino.

slides.title: Eat
slides.text: An authentic, natural, and unpretentious experience.

slides.title: Play
slides.text: Walk, explore, relax: every corner has its surprises.

slides.title: Discover
slides.text: Explore medieval villages and enjoy local events.

title.title2: Through Hills, Valleys and The Sea

activities.description: The guests can visit many medieval villages, some of which are visible in the distance: Micciano, Libbiano, Pomarance, Montecastelli and Radicondoli. Here throughout the summer, almost every Sunday, it takes place local festivals that are always accompanied by a tasting of local products. Also during the spring-summer-autumn  excursions, trekking and other activities are organized

accordionData.title: What makes Agriturismo Segarelli unique?
accordionData.content: At Agriturismo Segarelli you will find the sounds, colors, and scents typical of the Tuscan countryside. The blue sky reflecting in the pool water, the green of the meadow and the surrounding woods ensuring privacy and tranquility; the warm colors of the massive walls, which alone tell the story of this place, dating back at least to 1680; the deep red geraniums, carefully tended by Norma.

accordionData.title: What activities are available nearby?
accordionData.content: Agriturismo Segarelli is in a strategic location, in the heart of Tuscany: 30 minutes from Volterra, one hour from Siena, just over an hour from Pisa or Lucca, and an hour and a half from Florence. In addition, in just half an hour you can reach the coast that was so cherished by the Etruscans.

accordionData.title: Is the swimming pool available all year round?
accordionData.content: Unfortunately, no. The pool is open seasonally, generally from May to September, depending on weather conditions.

accordionData.title: Are you open all year round?
accordionData.content: Yes, of course! Did you know that this area is historically famous for geothermal energy? Here, to keep warm, we use steam that is also used to produce electricity. So you can relax — in winter, it’s always cozy here.

apartments.name: Acacia
apartments.description: A cozy and welcoming apartment (42 sqm), designed for couples who want a practical and relaxing stay without giving up privacy and a warm, homely atmosphere

apartments.name: Edera
apartments.description: Spacious apartment (70 sqm) ideal for couples, located on the upper floor with a panoramic terrace overlooking Monte Rufoli park. Perfect for those looking for comfort, brightness and relaxing moments with a view

apartments.name: Gelsomino
apartments.description: An apartment (80 sqm) on two floors designed for friends or families, with a large and bright living room, equipped kitchen and two double bedrooms. Every detail is designed to combine shared moments and private spaces for a relaxing and stress-free stay
